tasks.label: copy-env-example
tasks.command: if (!(Test-Path .env)) { Copy-Item .env.example .env; Write-Host 'Created .env from .env.example' } else { Write-Host '.env already exists' }

tasks.label: env-checklist
tasks.command: Write-Host 'node:' (node --version); Write-Host 'git:' (git --version); Write-Host 'claude:' (if (Get-Command claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { 'found' } else { 'missing' }); Write-Host 'opencode:' (if (Get-Command opencode -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { 'found' } else { 'missing' }); Write-Host '.env:' (Test-Path .env)
